headline: Does Strong Q1 Results And SKYRIZI Expansion Reshape The Bull Case For AbbVie (ABBV)?
summary: In recent weeks, AbbVie reported first-quarter 2026 revenue of US$15,002 million, while also securing new Canadian formulary listings and reimbursement progress for SKYRIZI in ulcerative colitis alongside fresh clinical and regulatory updates for SKYRIZI and RINVOQ across inflammatory and autoimmune diseases. Together with an ongoing dividend record and advances in areas such as immunology, gastroenterology and oncology partnerships, these developments highlight how AbbVie is leaning on its...
